_doc: FAA flight-category color palette. Used by METAR plot, CVA, and any 'color by ceiling/visibility' rendering. Hex values are the canonical AviationWeather.gov NWS palette. Phase A ships the file as a substrate placeholder; the consuming charts land in Phase C (METAR plot) and Phase E (CVA).
_source: AviationWeather.gov NWS standard flight category palette
